title: Section 4
content: 1 [(1) The Central Government may appoint a a person to be the Director-General of the Force and such other supervisory officers as considered necessary.] (2) The 2[Director-General] and every other supervisory officer so appointed shall have, and may exercise, such powers and authority as is provided by or under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 22 of 2009, s. 4, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 10-1-2009). 2. Subs. by Act 14 of 1983, s. 5, for "Inspector-General" (w.e.f. 15-6-1983).
